title: Agents and Business Managers of Artists, Performers, and Athletes
description: Represent and promote artists, performers, and athletes in dealings with current or prospective employers. May handle contract negotiation and other business matters for clients.

tasks.text: Collect fees, commissions, or other payments, according to contract terms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Send samples of clients' work and other promotional material to potential employers to obtain auditions, sponsorships, or endorsement deals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Keep informed of industry trends and deals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct auditions or interviews to evaluate potential clients.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Negotiate with managers, promoters, union officials, and other persons regarding clients' contractual rights and obligations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with clients to develop strategies for their careers, and to explain actions taken on their behalf.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop contacts with individuals and organizations, and apply effective strategies and techniques to ensure their clients' success.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule promotional or performance engagements for clients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange meetings concerning issues involving their clients.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage business and financial affairs for clients, such as arranging travel and lodging, selling tickets, and directing marketing and advertising activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Hire trainers or coaches to advise clients on performance matters, such as training techniques or performance presentations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare periodic accounting statements for clients.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain information about or inspect performance facilities, equipment, and accommodations to ensure that they meet specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise clients on financial and legal matters, such as investments and taxes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
